Where the 12 hours go: a breakdown.

  • 4.0 hrs — recurring status reports and syncs
  • 3.5 hrs — repetitive code review comments (formatting, style)
  • 2.5 hrs — manual deploy/release coordination
  • 2.0 hrs — ticket triage and label routing

Methodology: self-reported time tracking over 4 weeks, reconciled with calendar data.

< Back to Problem
Appendix — only surface if a reader asks "where did that 12 come from?"
